content.text:
I'm not -- I mean, I'm not scared, I just need to be prepared, that's all. Like if I walk in there not knowing what he wants to talk about, I look unprepared, and this is a new role, so I need to -- 

*[slight pause]*

I just need to not drop the ball. That's it. It's not fear, it's just... being responsible. Being on top of things.

*[faster again]*

And there's also the thing with my team, I have two people who are waiting on me for feedback and I haven't gotten to it and that's blocking them, so that's actually more urgent than Thursday maybe? Or is it? See, this is what I mean, I can't even figure out what's most urgent, everything feels like it's on fire.
